name: axiom-packaging-tools
description: Repo tooling (NOT part of the engine dependency graph): pins the Binaryen toolchain (wasm-opt + wasm2js) that scripts/package_app.py uses to optimize a packaged app's wasm and emit its no-WebAssembly wasm2js fallback. Mirrors the 'npm is repo tooling' status of packages/axiom-client's gate stack.
